evidence: Agitate strongly resonates with causing material disturbance (ontological.material), societal unrest (scale.society), and triggering systemic change (interconnection.catalytic). Agitative resonates strongest with interconnection.catalytic (triggering change), ontological.relational (social dynamics), and resonance.essential (core unrest). It operates across scales from individual to societal and emphasizes transformative effects over time.
